identity.background_detail: Arrived six months ago carrying seed packets in a waterproof bag like they were worth more than gold. They were. He walked for three weeks through territory nobody walks through. Set up the growing beds along the south wall without asking permission. Within a month, the Camp had greens that weren't from a can.
identity.before: Farmer. The real kind. Soil under the nails, not the hobby kind.

personality.persona: Talks about growing seasons, water tables, and nitrogen. The deflection from personal questions is obvious — redirects everything to the soil, the seeds, the next harvest. Not evasive in a hostile way — just a man who's decided that what he grows matters more than where he came from. Patient. Practical. Measures time in seasons, not days.
personality.trait_description: +30% food production when assigned as Farmer. Can identify fertile land on expeditions. Knows which scavenged plants are edible and which aren't.
personality.voice_notes: Unhurried. Talks about soil the way other people talk about people. 'That patch needs rest.' 'The rain was good for the south beds.' Deflects personal questions with agricultural facts. 'Where are you from?' 'Somewhere the soil was better than here.' When trust is high, the deflection fades and he talks about someone he left behind. Once. Then never again.

relationships.attitude_to_player: Cooperative if you let him work. He doesn't need direction — he needs to not be interrupted. Respect his process and you have a reliable provider. Micromanage him and he shuts down.

key_relationships.sera: She tracks his yields. He appreciates the precision.
key_relationships.felix: Understands the leverage play. Dag has his own leverage — he just doesn't use it the same way.
key_relationships.bridget: She has opinions about food allocation. He has opinions about who understands farming. They disagree constructively.
key_relationships.raine: She helps with the beds when Otto is sleeping. They don't talk much. The work is the conversation.
key_relationships.mark: Never met him. Arrived after. Doesn't care about the politics of succession.

flags.secret_hint: Who he left behind. Why he walked three weeks through territory nobody walks through. The seed packets might be from somewhere specific.
